sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64453" key="madai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰδαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μαδαρός, ἕλκη</foreign> Poet. <sense id="n64453.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg029:83" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">83</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
